channel.title: Redis on Chasing's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Redis on Chasing's blog

item.title: Redis Data Structure
item.description: Redis Data Structure 0. Redis Object 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 struct RedisObject { int4 type; // 4bits \ int4 enconding; // 4bits = 4bytes int24 lru; // 24bits / int32 refcount; // 4bytes void* ptr; // 8bytes (64bit-system) } robj; RedisObject对于不通对象都是相同的，对于这样
